name: the node entry's crawl scope annotation is invisible to pre-crawl registry consumers which still read source_id url and tier
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'reg = YAML.safe_load(File.read(ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"] + "/standards/technology-source-registry.yaml")); rows = ((reg["technologies"] || {})["node"] || []).map { |s| [s["source_id"], (s["url"] || ""), (s["tier"] || 1)].join("\t") }; ok = rows == ["nodejs-api-docs\thttps://nodejs.org/api/\t1"] && reg["technologies"].size >= 14; STDERR.puts "scope-invisible-to-pre-crawl-consumers" if ok; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)'
